name_en: [Chip Version] Model: M24861 Black, Small CarryAll Cargo Bag. This Small CarryAll Cargo bag features soft calfskin with a stylish wrinkled effect, polished metal hardware, and a relaxed silhouette, making it a versatile choice for day and night. Includes a detachable shoulder strap and chain strap for multiple styling options. Size: 33.5x23x15cm
